column1: # Columns are tab-separated; # and blank lines are ignored. Every verdict branch
# carries a firing and a non-firing case (delegation-kit/SPEC.md §Testing).
# Defaults under test: PAUSE_PCT=80, STALE_AGE=600, LOGIN_WINDOW=600.
# OK — under threshold, fresh reading, live window
# PAUSE — over threshold, fresh, live window, no recent login

column7: fractional just over the boundary (int truncation would miss)
over threshold with an old login (no lag reroute)

column1: # STALE — post-login lag, stale reading, and non-numeric fail-closed

column7: over threshold but a fresh login -> STALE (server-fed pct lags)

column1: # RESET-OK — the window rolled over; the pct is from the dead window

column7: dead window -> RESET-OK (a high pct must not read as PAUSE)
